description_long: This is a futuristic, bat-like airplane with a wide, angular wingspan and a streamlined fuselage. The wings are sharply swept and feature thin, wire-like extensions at the tips, giving it a distinctive silhouette. The aircraft has two prominent engines mounted under the wings, and the landing gear is visible beneath the fuselage, suggesting a tricycle configuration. The cockpit is positioned forward and appears to be enclosed, with a canopy integrated smoothly into the body. The tail section is compact, with a single vertical stabilizer and a low horizontal stabilizer. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a predominantly gray metallic finish and some insignia or markings on the sides.
description: A sleek, futuristic airplane with swept wings, underwing engines, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. The design features a bat-like silhouette and a metallic gray finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, angular wingspan, forward cockpit, and underwing engines.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the streamlined fuselage, cockpit canopy, and visible insignia on the tail section.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin engines, landing gear, and compact tail with a single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the wing structure, wire-like extensions, and additional details on the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and thin, wire-like tip extensions; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and low horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main units and a single nose gear, all fixed and visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy integrated into the fuselage.
